title: Counting and Colors: A Math Journey for Preschoolers
description: An interactive guide introducing basic math concepts of counting and color recognition for children ages 3–5. Includes activities, songs, and printable worksheets aligned with early learning standards.

title: Phonics Fun: Building Early Literacy Skills
description: A comprehensive phonics resource designed for kindergarten and pre-K classrooms. Covers letter sounds, blending, and segmenting with engaging illustrations and read-aloud activities.

title: Social-Emotional Learning for Little Learners
description: A teacher’s guide to fostering emotional intelligence in children ages 3–6. Features classroom strategies, picture book recommendations, and family engagement activities focused on empathy and self-regulation.

title: Exploring Science with Young Children
description: Hands-on science investigations for preschool and kindergarten. Encourages curiosity and observation skills through simple experiments with everyday materials. Aligned with NGSS foundational concepts.

title: Music and Movement: Creative Arts for Early Learners
description: An arts-integrated curriculum resource integrating music, dance, and visual art into daily early childhood routines. Includes lesson plans, song recordings, and printable art activities.

title: Growing Up Healthy: Physical Development in Early Childhood
description: A resource for educators and families on supporting gross and fine motor development in children birth to age 5. Includes activity cards, developmental milestones, and guidance for inclusive settings.

title: Family Engagement Toolkit for Early Childhood Programs
description: Practical strategies and tools for building strong partnerships between early childhood educators and families. Covers communication, home learning activities, and culturally responsive practices.

title: Multicultural Storytime: Books and Activities for Diverse Classrooms
description: A curated collection of multicultural picture books and extension activities celebrating diversity for pre-K through Grade 1. Includes discussion guides, art projects, and family connection letters.
